channel.title: VulnCheck — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by VulnCheck (vulncheck).

item.title: CVE-2019-25748 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla JHotelReservation 6.0.7 SQL Injection via search-hotels
item.description: Joomla JHotelReservation 6.0.7 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the rooms parameter. Attackers can send POST requests to the search-hote…

item.title: CVE-2017-20282 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component jCart for OpenCart 2.0 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component jCart for OpenCart 2.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries by injecting SQL code through the product_id parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php…

item.title: CVE-2017-20281 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component Extra Search 2.2.8 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component Extra Search 2.2.8 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries by injecting SQL code through the establename parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php wi…

item.title: CVE-2017-20280 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Component Myportfolio 3.0.2 SQL Injection via pid Parameter
item.description: Joomla Component Myportfolio 3.0.2 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries by injecting SQL code through the pid parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php with malicio…

item.title: CVE-2017-20279 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Payage 2.05 SQL Injection via aid Parameter
item.description: Joomla Payage 2.05 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries by injecting SQL code through the aid parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php with malicious aid values in…

item.title: CVE-2017-20278 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla JoomRecipe 1.0.3 SQL Injection via category parameter
item.description: Joomla Component JoomRecipe 1.0.3 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries by injecting SQL code through the category parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to the all-recipes en…

item.title: CVE-2017-20277 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla JoomRecipe 1.0.4 Component Blind SQL Injection via search_author
item.description: Joomla JoomRecipe 1.0.4 component contains a blind SQL injection vulnerability in the search_author parameter on the search results page. Attackers can inject SQL code through POST requests to the search endpoint to extract database information using…

item.title: CVE-2017-20276 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component SIMGenealogy 2.1.5 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component SIMGenealogy 2.1.5 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries by injecting SQL code through the type parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php with the…

item.title: CVE-2017-20275 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component PHP-Bridge 1.2.3 SQL Injection via id Parameter
item.description: Joomla! Component PHP-Bridge 1.2.3 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the id parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php with…

item.title: CVE-2017-20274 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla LMS King Professional 3.2.4.0 SQL Injection via learningpath
item.description: Joomla LMS King Professional 3.2.4.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate database queries by injecting SQL code through the cp_id parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php with the…

item.title: CVE-2017-20273 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Event Registration Pro Calendar 4.1.3 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla Event Registration Pro Calendar 4.1.3 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the id parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index…

item.title: CVE-2017-20272 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Ultimate Property Listing 1.0.2 SQL Injection via sf_selectuser_id
item.description: Joomla Ultimate Property Listing 1.0.2 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the sf_selectuser_id parameter. Attackers can send GET requests…

item.title: CVE-2017-20271 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla StreetGuessr Game 1.1.8 SQL Injection via catid
item.description: Joomla StreetGuessr Game 1.1.8 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the catid parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php with t…

item.title: CVE-2017-20270 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component Twitch Tv 1.1 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component Twitch Tv 1.1 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the username and id parameters. Attackers can send GET requests to inde…

item.title: CVE-2017-20269 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component KissGallery 1.0.0 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component KissGallery 1.0.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to inject SQL commands through the component URL path. Attackers can supply malicious SQL code in the kissgallery endpoint to execute ar…

item.title: CVE-2017-20268 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component Zap Calendar Lite 4.3.4 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component Zap Calendar Lite 4.3.4 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the 'eid' parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to the R…

item.title: CVE-2017-20267 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component Calendar Planner 1.0.1 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component Calendar Planner 1.0.1 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to inject SQL commands through the category_id parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to the events view with malicious SQL cod…

item.title: CVE-2017-20266 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla SP Movie Database 1.3 SQL Injection via searchword
item.description: Joomla SP Movie Database 1.3 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the searchword parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to the searchres…

item.title: CVE-2017-20265 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component Flip Wall 8.0 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component Flip Wall 8.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the wallid parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php with…

item.title: CVE-2017-20264 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component Sponsor Wall 8.0 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component Sponsor Wall 8.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the wallid parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php w…

item.title: CVE-2017-20263 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! FocalPoint Pro Free 1.2.3 SQL Injection via location
item.description: Joomla! Component FocalPoint Pro/Free 1.2.3 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the id parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.…

item.title: CVE-2017-20262 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component Ajax Quiz 1.8 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component Ajax Quiz 1.8 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the cid parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php with th…

item.title: CVE-2017-20261 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component Bargain Product VM3 1.0 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component Bargain Product VM3 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the product_id parameter. Attackers can supply crafted SQL st…

item.title: CVE-2017-20260 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component Price Alert 3.0.2 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component Price Alert 3.0.2 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the product_id parameter. Attackers can send requests to the subscr…

item.title: CVE-2017-20259 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla OSDownloads 1.7.4 SQL Injection via item view
item.description: Joomla OSDownloads 1.7.4 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the id parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php with option=com…

item.title: CVE-2017-20258 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component RPC Responsive Portfolio 1.6.1 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component RPC Responsive Portfolio 1.6.1 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the id parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to i…

item.title: CVE-2017-20257 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component Quiz Deluxe 3.7.4 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component Quiz Deluxe 3.7.4 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands through the ajaxaction.flag_question task. Attackers can inject malicious SQL code via the stu_quiz_id…

item.title: CVE-2017-20256 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla Survey Force Deluxe 3.2.4 SQL Injection via invite Parameter
item.description: Joomla Survey Force Deluxe 3.2.4 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the invite parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to the component…

item.title: CVE-2017-20255 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component JB Visa 1.0 SQL Injection via visatype
item.description: Joomla! Component JB Visa 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the visatype parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php with…

item.title: CVE-2017-20254 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component User Bench 1.0 SQL Injection via userid
item.description: Joomla! Component User Bench 1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the userid parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php wit…

item.title: CVE-2017-20253 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla! Component My Projects 2.0 SQL Injection
item.description: Joomla! Component My Projects 2.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries by injecting malicious code through the VerAyari parameter. Attackers can craft requests to the component…

item.title: CVE-2017-20252 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Joomla NextGen Editor 2.1.0 SQL Injection via plname Parameter
item.description: Joomla NextGen Editor 2.1.0 contains an SQL injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands through the plname parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to index.php with option=com_nge&view=config and…

item.title: CVE-2026-56078 · 8.8 HIGH — PraisonAI - Arbitrary File Read and Write via Path Traversal in MultiAgentMonitor
item.description: PraisonAI before 1.5.115 contains a path traversal vulnerability in MultiAgentMonitor that fails to sanitize agent IDs when building file paths. Attackers can include traversal sequences like ../ in agent IDs to read, write, or overwrite arbitrary fi…

item.title: CVE-2026-56077 · 7.1 HIGH — PraisonAI - Information Disclosure via Shared MultiAgentLedger State
item.description: PraisonAI before 1.5.115 contains an information disclosure vulnerability in the MultiAgentLedger component that allows attackers to access sensitive data by registering agents with duplicate IDs. Attackers can exploit the lack of agent ID uniqueness…

item.title: CVE-2026-56076 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — PraisonAI - Cross-Origin Agent Execution via Hardcoded Wildcard CORS and Missing Authentication on AGUI Endpoint
item.description: PraisonAI before 1.5.128 contains a cross-origin agent execution vulnerability in the AGUI endpoint that allows remote attackers to trigger arbitrary agent execution. The POST /agui endpoint lacks authentication and hardcodes Access-Control-Allow-Ori…

item.title: CVE-2026-56075 · 8.8 HIGH — PraisonAI - Arbitrary Shell Command Execution via Hardcoded Approval Mode Override
item.description: PraisonAI before 4.5.128 contains an arbitrary shell command execution vulnerability where the UI modules hardcode approval_mode to auto, overriding administrator configuration from PRAISON_APPROVAL_MODE environment variable. Authenticated attackers…

item.title: CVE-2026-56074 · 6.8 MEDIUM — PraisonAI - Tool Approval Cache Bypass via Coarse-Grained Caching
item.description: PraisonAI before 1.5.128 caches tool approval decisions by tool name only, not by invocation arguments, allowing subsequent execute_command calls to bypass approval prompts. Attackers can exploit this by obtaining initial approval for a benign comman…

item.title: CVE-2026-22674 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Hashgraph Guardian Stored XSS via branding companyName field
item.description: Hashgraph Guardian through 3.5.0, fixed in commit ba8c566, contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows authenticated users with the STANDARD_REGISTRY role to inject malicious scripts by submitting a crafted companyName value via…

item.title: CVE-2026-25865 · 8.5 HIGH — Punto Switcher 4.5.0.583 Unquoted Search Path via WinExec
item.description: Punto Switcher through 4.5.0.583 contains an unquoted search path element vulnerability that allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code by exploiting the application's call to WinExec without a fully qualified path for RunDll32.exe when invokin…

item.title: CVE-2026-56099 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — OpenBSD mpls_do_error Kernel Stack Memory Disclosure via MPLS Input
item.description: OpenBSD before commit 6a23123 (2026-06-18) contains an out-of-bounds read vulnerability in the mpls_do_error function within sys/netmpls/mpls_input.c that allows remote attackers to disclose kernel stack memory by sending crafted MPLS frames with 16…

item.title: CVE-2026-55392 · 6.7 MEDIUM — NILFS utilities - Undefined Behavior and Out-of-Memory via Unvalidated s_log_block_size
item.description: NILFS utilities through 2.3.0, fixed in commit 26efb5d, nilfs_sb_is_valid() function fails to validate s_log_block_size field in NILFS2 superblock before bit-shift operations. Attackers supplying crafted NILFS2 images trigger undefined behavior throu…

item.title: CVE-2026-54390 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — JTL Shop < 5.7.2 Server-Side Template Injection via Smarty Renderer
item.description: JTL Shop versions 5.2.0 through 5.7.1 contains a server-side template injection vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to inject malicious template syntax due to unsanitized user-supplied input passed to the Smarty template engine. Attac…

item.title: CVE-2026-55204 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — HAProxy - NULL Pointer Dereference in hpack_dht_insert Function
item.description: HAProxy through 3.4.0, fixed in commit 9a6d1fe, contains a null pointer dereference vulnerability in hpack_dht_insert() within src/hpack-tbl.c that fails to validate the return value of hpack_dht_defrag() when the memory pool is exhausted. An attacke…

item.title: CVE-2026-55203 · 9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — HAProxy - Integer Overflow in FCGI Demux Record Length Field
item.description: HAProxy through 3.4.0, fixed in commit 5985276, contains an integer overflow vulnerability in the fcgi_conn structure's drl field that allows buffer misparse as new FCGI record headers. When contentLength is 65535 and paddingLength is 1 or more, the…

item.title: CVE-2026-55205 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Hermes WebUI < 0.51.468 - Resource Exhaustion via Unauthenticated OAuth Flow Endpoint
item.description: Hermes WebUI before 0.51.468 contains a resource exhaustion vulnerability in the unauthenticated POST /api/onboarding/oauth/start endpoint that allows unbounded accumulation of in-memory flow state and daemon threads. Attackers can send repeated or c…

item.title: CVE-2026-54386 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — marimo < 0.23.9 XSS via file Query Parameter in assets.py
item.description: marimo before 0.23.9 contains a reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability in the notebook page that allows unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary JavaScript by exploiting improper escaping of single quotes in the file query parameter reflec…

item.title: CVE-2026-49133 · 7.1 HIGH — Typemill < 2.24.0 Path Traversal via ControllerApiImage::getPagemedia()
item.description: Typemill before 2.24.0 contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers with Author-level privileges to read arbitrary files outside the content directory by supplying traversal sequences in the path query parameter passed…

item.title: CVE-2026-11407 · 8.6 HIGH — Pimcore CMS 12.3.8 Twig Sandbox Bypass via SecurityPolicy checkMethodAllowed
item.description: Pimcore CMS/DXP version 12.3.8 contains a sandbox bypass vulnerability that allows authenticated administrative attackers to execute arbitrary methods on PHP objects by exploiting empty checkMethodAllowed() and checkPropertyAllowed() implementations…

item.title: CVE-2026-54388 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Tinyproxy - HTTP Request Smuggling via Duplicate Content-Length Headers
item.description: Tinyproxy through 1.11.3, fixed in commit 364cdb6, fails to reject requests containing multiple Content-Length headers with differing values, forwarding all duplicate headers to the backend while using the first value to determine how many request bo…

item.title: CVE-2026-54387 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Tinyproxy - HTTP Request Smuggling via CL/TE Desynchronization
item.description: Tinyproxy through 1.11.3, fixed in commit ff45d3b, fails to reconcile conflicting Content-Length and Transfer-Encoding: chunked headers, forwarding both verbatim to the backend while using Content-Length to determine how many request body bytes to co…
